title: Video Call Controls
drDigitalIntro: During a video call, you have controls at the bottom of the screen. You can mute your microphone (so they can't hear you) or turn off your camera (they see a blank screen instead of video). The microphone button shows a mic icon — tap it to mute. The camera button shows a camera icon — tap it to hide your video. These are essential when there's background noise or you need a moment of privacy.

playgroundTask.goal: You used all the video call controls

steps.say: Click on Sam to open their conversation.
Start a video call with Sam.
Someone's being noisy! Click the microphone button to mute yourself.
Now turn off your camera — click the camera button.
All done — end the call with the red button.

drDigitalSuccess: You muted, turned off the camera, and ended the call! Those three controls are all you need to manage any video call.
drDigitalHint: Look at the row of circle buttons at the bottom of the call screen.
